christensen.mechanism: Spring-loaded mechanical door-handle guard with piezoelectric alarm horn (95 dB) + 868 MHz EasyWave radio transmitter that broadcasts guard-state and alarm events to centralized receivers and BUS interfaces
christensen.function: Secure emergency exit doors against unauthorized use while preserving unimpeded single-motion escape capability and reporting door status events to centralized monitoring — without mains power at the door
christensen.outcome: Building operators achieve regulatory compliance for emergency exit routes while gaining real-time visibility into door status, reducing manual inspection costs, and enabling proactive maintenance

technology.class: Emergency Exit Security Devices with Remote Monitoring
technology.underlyingMechanism: Spring-loaded mechanical door-handle guard with piezoelectric alarm horn and 868 MHz wireless state transmitter
technology.unspscPath: 46171500 — Locks and security hardware (nearest class; no exact 8-digit commodity match)

functionalPromise.statement: Secure emergency exit doors against unauthorized use while preserving unimpeded single-motion escape capability and reporting door status events to centralized monitoring — without mains power at the door
functionalPromise.object: emergency exit doors against unauthorized use
functionalPromise.context: in any building with mandated emergency exits, while simultaneously preserving unimpeded single-motion escape per EN 179 / EN 1125

commodityFunctionalPromise: Prevent unauthorized use of emergency exit doors while maintaining unimpeded escape capability and alerting to door activation via audible alarm
differentiators: Mechanical alarm operates independently of electrical power (fail-safe under all fault conditions)
Single-motion escape compliant with both EN 179 (lever handle) and EN 1125 (panic bar) — dual-standard coverage
Wireless status reporting without mains wiring at the door point — retrofit-ready installation

features.name: Handle Depression Block
features.short: Block door handle depression in secured state
features.long: A mechanical guard housing sits over the door handle, physically preventing downward motion. The door cannot be opened until the guard is deliberately swung aside, providing tamper-evident security without electrical power.

features.name: Audible Alarm Trigger
features.short: Sound 95 dB alarm on unauthorized door activation
features.long: When the guard is swung 45°, a piezoelectric horn produces a 95 dB alarm (adjustable volume, LED indication). The alarm is triggered mechanically — no battery or electrical power required for the alarm function itself.

features.name: Single-Motion Escape
features.short: Allow escape in one hand movement per EN 179/1125
features.long: The guard swing simultaneously releases the door handle and triggers the alarm in a single motion, complying with DIN EN 179 (lever handle, ≤70N force) and DIN EN 1125 (panic bar, ≥60% door width). No prior knowledge or tools required for emergency egress.

features.name: Key Override Bypass
features.short: Allow authorized access without triggering alarm
features.long: A profile half-cylinder key allows authorized personnel to disengage the guard and open the door without triggering the alarm. Key override supports building operations (maintenance, deliveries) without disturbing occupants.

features.name: Battery-Powered Operation
features.short: Operate alarm and IoT monitoring on replaceable 9V battery
features.long: A standard 9V block battery (replaceable without tools) powers the IoT radio module and optional pre-alarm tone. The mechanical alarm functions even with a dead battery — the IoT layer is supervisory only, preserving fail-safe operation.

features.name: Pre-Alarm Warning Tone
features.short: Sound preliminary tone on initial contact before full alarm
features.long: An optional pre-alarm function sounds a warning tone when the handle is slightly touched. If released, the warning ceases. Full handle depression triggers the main 95 dB alarm. This deters accidental activations and provides a deterrent step.

features.name: Wireless State Transmission
features.short: Transmit guard state wirelessly to central receivers
features.long: An integrated 868.3 MHz EasyWave radio transmitter broadcasts guard-state events (door opened, alarm triggered, battery low) to wireless receivers within ~30 m line-of-sight. Receivers relay to BUS systems or building management dashboards.

features.name: Master BUS Centralization
features.short: Centralize multiple door guardians into Master BUS
features.long: A wireless BUS interface aggregates status from multiple Türwächter units across a building, enabling centralized monitoring of all emergency exits from a single dashboard. Supports multi-device integration for campus and portfolio deployments.

features.name: Dual-Standard Coverage
features.short: Cover both lever-handle and panic-bar installations
features.long: The product family includes variants certified to DIN EN 179 (lever handle operation) and DIN EN 1125 (panic bar operation), covering both standard door configurations found in European and international emergency exit regulations.

features.name: Outdoor IP45 Protection
features.short: Operate in outdoor and semi-exposed installations
features.long: The IP45-rated outdoor variant (Art. 990000-IP) provides protection against water jets from any direction, enabling deployment on semi-exposed emergency exits (covered walkways, loading docks, outdoor stairwells).

features.name: Glass-Frame Compatibility
features.short: Install on glass-framed emergency exit doors
features.long: An optional glass-frame mounting plate (Art. 991170) enables installation on glass-framed emergency exit doors where standard handle mounting is not possible, extending deployment to modern architectural contexts.

features.name: EasyWave 868 MHz Protocol
features.short: Proprietary EasyWave wireless protocol with proven reliability
features.long: GfS's proprietary 868.3 MHz EasyWave protocol provides interference-resistant wireless communication optimized for building environments. The protocol is proven across GfS's installed base of emergency exit devices but requires GfS-specific receivers and gateways.

features.name: GfS Wireless BUS Ecosystem
features.short: Complete wireless BUS infrastructure for multi-device deployments
features.long: GfS offers a complete ecosystem of wireless receivers (70×62×35 mm, 57g), repeaters (+30 m range extension per unit), BUS interfaces, and external signal devices (strobes, sirens) — all purpose-built for the Exit Control product family.

features.name: Assa Abloy Distribution Network
features.short: Leverage Assa Abloy's global security hardware channel
features.long: As part of the Assa Abloy Group (world's largest lock and security hardware manufacturer), GfS products benefit from established distribution, specification influence, and co-selling opportunities with Assa Abloy's broader door hardware and access control portfolio.

features.name: Retrofit Surface-Mount Design
features.short: Install on existing doors without structural modification
features.long: The Türwächter mounts directly onto existing door handles or panic bars with no drilling, wiring, or structural door modification required. Installation takes <30 minutes per door and requires no electrician — a key differentiator for retrofit projects in existing buildings.

specifications.name: Installation
specifications.testCondition: On door handle; mounting plate for glass frames available

billOfMaterials.name: Mechanical Locking & Release Subsystem
billOfMaterials.description: Guard housing, spring mechanism, handle clamp, panic bar adapter

billOfMaterials.name: Acoustic Alarm Subsystem
billOfMaterials.description: Piezoelectric horn, volume control, LED indicator, pre-alarm circuit

billOfMaterials.name: IoT Telemetry Subsystem
billOfMaterials.description: 868 MHz EasyWave transmitter, antenna, state detection circuit, battery compartment

billOfMaterials.name: Enclosure & Mounting Subsystem
billOfMaterials.description: Polycarbonate housing (RAL 6029), mounting bracket, glass-frame adapter plate (optional), IP45 seals (outdoor variant)
